events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: kick-out flashing missing at roof-wall intersection, work in progress. This is a sequence violation - kick-out flashing must be installed before WRB and siding proceed at roof-wall intersections. Missing kick-out flashing is a defect that can cause water intrusion. Decision should be fail.
